info.name: Society Management System - 57 Features API Testing
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection mapping all 57 system APIs for the Society Management System.

request.description: Fetch profile, flat details, family members, and vehicle counts.
Add a family member or co-resident to the resident's flat.
List all family members added to the current flat.
Update details of a family member.
Remove a family member from the flat records.
Add owned vehicle with color, brand, type and number plate verification.
List all registered vehicles for the current resident.
Manage owner or tenant status through profile update details.
Upload KYC documents like Aadhaar, PAN or Passport.
List all uploaded KYC records for the current flat.
Submit move out date and reason for admin approval (Owner only).
Generate a secure tokenized sharing link for prospective buyers/tenants.
List generated flat document sharing links.
Unauthenticated public resolver endpoint to access the shared flat document.
View outstanding maintenance dues and bills.
Initiate payment to get secure cryptographic proof signature.
Pay maintenance online using dummy gateway signature verification.
Fetch payment receipt file details and paths.
Fetch automatic billing and recurring payment configurations.
Get all maintenance bills showing due amounts, penalties and detailed fees.
Raise dispute against wrong billing calculations.
Upload reading with current bounds checks.
Pre-approve guests, delivery helpers, or visitors.
Verify OTP code at gate entry.
View visitor entries for my flat.
List helpers registered to the flat.
Record attendance, enforcing shift and trigger check-in/out alerts.
Pre-authorize delivery partner for gate entry code.

formdata.value: Bathroom washbasin tap has a major leak.

request.description: Submit a complaint with optional image upload.
Listens to Server-Sent Events stream for updates. To test in Postman, use GET on this URL.
Add a comment/chat message to the complaint.
Rate the quality of complaint resolution (1-5 scale).

request.description: Update complaint status (Open / In Progress / Resolved).
Cancel booking within allowed window (24 hours in advance).
Instant panic alert sent to gate security and committee.
Emergency contact numbers (fire, helpline, gate security).
Simulated intercom calling request sent to society office.
Receive active emergency SOS status triggers.
Browse shared resident contact details via discussion forum.
